parameters.query:
SELECT 
  c.id as cita_id,
  c.barberia_id,
  b.slug,
  c.cliente_nombre,
  c.cliente_tel,
  to_char(c.fecha, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as fecha,
  to_char(c.hora_inicio, 'HH24:MI') as hora_inicio,
  to_char(c.hora_fin, 'HH24:MI') as hora_fin,
  s.id as servicio_id,
  s.nombre as servicio_nombre,
  s.precio as servicio_precio,
  s.duracion_min as servicio_duracion_min,
  bar.id as barbero_id,
  bar.nombre as barbero_nombre,
  b.nombre as barberia_nombre,
  b.direccion as barberia_direccion,
  b.ciudad as barberia_ciudad,
  p.maps_url as barberia_maps_url
FROM public.citas c
JOIN public.barberias b ON c.barberia_id = b.id
LEFT JOIN public.barberia_public_profiles p ON c.barberia_id = p.barberia_id
LEFT JOIN public.servicios s ON c.servicio_id = s.id
LEFT JOIN public.barberos bar ON c.barbero_id = bar.id
WHERE c.id = $1;

SELECT 
  c.id as cita_id,
  c.barberia_id,
  b.slug,
  c.cliente_nombre,
  c.cliente_tel,
  to_char(c.fecha, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as fecha,
  to_char(c.hora_inicio, 'HH24:MI') as hora_inicio,
  to_char(c.hora_fin, 'HH24:MI') as hora_fin,
  s.id as servicio_id,
  s.nombre as servicio_nombre,
  s.precio as servicio_precio,
  s.duracion_min as servicio_duracion_min,
  bar.id as barbero_id,
  bar.nombre as barbero_nombre,
  b.nombre as barberia_nombre,
  b.direccion as barberia_direccion,
  b.ciudad as barberia_ciudad,
  p.maps_url as barberia_maps_url
FROM public.citas c
JOIN public.barberias b ON c.barberia_id = b.id
LEFT JOIN public.barberia_public_profiles p ON c.barberia_id = p.barberia_id
LEFT JOIN public.servicios s ON c.servicio_id = s.id
LEFT JOIN public.barberos bar ON c.barbero_id = bar.id
WHERE c.id = $1;
